ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-24-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANT HENRY LAUGHLIN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS NOT TIMELY FILED, AND THE AMENDED MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL IS STRICKEN AS UNTIMELY. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/23/14 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 IS MAINTAINED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT HENRY LAUGHLIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MAINTAINS HIS INITIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION BASED ON (INTER ALIA) HIS DECLARATION. THE COURT DOES NOT ENTERTAIN PLAINTIFF'S UNTIMELY OPPOSITION. IN ADDITION, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE AN OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT. SEE CCP 437C(B)(3). LASTLY, DEFENDANT PROPERLY OBJECTS TO PLAINTIFF'S "EVIDENCE" AS CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT BECAUSE HE DOES NOT PRESENT EVIDENTIARY FACTS TO OPPOSE THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: PAULA SHI #13358.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Based On The Ground Of Extrinsic Fraud Upon The Court
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court ruled as follows:

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summ Adj
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tibor Szabo, plaintiff in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HENRY LAUGHLIN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant maintains his initial burden of production based on (inter alia) his declaration. The court does not entertain plaintiff's untimely opposition. In addition, the court grants the motion because plaintiff failed to file an opposing separate statement. See CCP 437c(b)(3). Lastly, defendant properly objects to plaintiff's "evidence" as conclusory allegations. Plaintiff failed to create a triable issue of material fact because he does not present evidentiary facts to oppose the motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.
